log_flow: Flow: 0 First setup → 1 Start → 2 Open Tray | 3 Close Tray | 4 Stop
log_restart_for_modes: Restart the driver (Stop → Start) or First setup for Windows to see new resolutions.
log_no_repo: ERROR: Project root not found (run Start-VDisplay.cmd next to VDisplay.sln).
log_testsign_fail: ERROR: Could not enable test signing. Did you approve the admin prompt?
log_reboot: IMPORTANT: If Test Mode was just enabled, REBOOT the PC now.
log_reboot_again: After reboot, confirm desktop shows «Test Mode», then Helper → «0. First setup» again.
log_reboot_required_now: STOP: Test Mode is not active yet. REBOOT now (admin alone is not enough).
log_testsign_ok: Test signing is active — installing driver...
log_native_missing: ERROR: dist\native\VDisplayNative.dll missing. Download/pull the latest repo.
log_end_user_dist: End user: download dist\driver from GitHub.
log_hint_reboot: • PC not rebooted yet (testsigning not active)
log_install_ok: Driver installed. Next: «1. Start» → then «2. Open Tray».
log_service_fail: ERROR: Could not connect to service. Try «1. Start» again.
log_driver_start_fail: Driver start failed — finish «0. First setup» (driver + reboot) first.
log_desktop_mode: Desktop mode: VMs are extra blank screens (no capture).
log_extend_hint: «5. Display settings» → Extend → place new monitors side by side.
log_split_mode: Split mode active. «5. Display settings» → place VMs side by side.
log_tray_hint: Optional: «2. Open Tray» for live preview (virtual monitors only).
log_tray_already_open: Tray already open. Use «3. Close Tray».
log_tray_info: 2. Tray: shows VDisplay virtual monitors only.
log_tray_need_start: «1. Start» must succeed first; new monitors should appear in Display settings.
log_tray_started: Tray started. If you see 'no VM', driver/start is incomplete.
